collectionId.description: The ID of the collection to update

link.description: Link of the bookmark to be created

important.description: Whether this bookmark is marked as favorite

order.description: Sort order for the bookmark. For example, to move it to first place, enter 0.

pleaseParse.description: Whether Raindrop should load cover, description and HTML for the URL

tags.description: Bookmark tags. Multiple tags can be set separated by comma.

title.description: Title of the bookmark to create

cover.description: URL of an image to use as cover for the collection

public.description: Whether the collection will be accessible without authentication

parentId.description: ID of this collection's parent collection, if it is a child collection

sort.description: Descending sort order of this collection. The number is the position of the collection among all the collections with the same parent ID.
